mapper.insert: insert into refresh_tokens (id, user_id, token, expiry_date, revoked, created_at) values ( #{refreshToken.id}, #{refreshToken.userId}, #{refreshToken.token}, #{refreshToken.expiryDate}, #{refreshToken.revoked}, #{refreshToken.createdAt} )
mapper.update: update refresh_tokens set revoked = true where user_id = #{userId}
mapper.delete: delete from refresh_tokens where expiry_date < CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
